LEGAL & USE TERMS

License

All rights, clearances, and open-source licenses covering the graphics, typography, photography, and scripts utilized on our platform.

Creative Agency Assets Clearance

We take copyright, asset usage, and framework agreements very seriously. This platform is built entirely using open-source, CC0, or specifically generated AI assets. No unauthorized trademarks or licensed premium graphics are used in this template.

Digital Assets List

Photography & Portraits

SOURCE: Unsplash / Midjourney

All team member portraits, background textures, and project visuals are fully cleared for personal and commercial digital displays.

Free Web Use / CC0 License

Icons & Vectors

SOURCE: Lucide React / Custom SVG Assets

Lucide-React vectors and custom 8-point geometric star icons used throughout the layout are fully open-source and adaptable.

MIT License

Typography & Web Fonts

SOURCE: Google Fonts (Inter & Parkinsans)

Inter sans-serif body fonts and Parkinsans block heading display typographies are freely served, modification-ready, and embeddable.

Open Font License (OFL)

Open-Source Packages

SOURCE: Next.js, Framer Motion, GSAP, Tailwind CSS

Underlying frameworks, layout sheets, animation timelines, and gesture recognizers are maintained under the respective MIT Licenses.

MIT License
